paper_title: Analysis of pollen fertility of coenopopulations of the genus Alyssum L. in the Southern Urals

methods.description: This method involves analyzing the pollen fertility of coenopopulations of the genus Alyssum L. in the Southern Urals to understand their reproductive success and adaptability.

steps.description: Collect pollen samples from various coenopopulations of Alyssum L. in the Southern Urals.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen samples from Alyssum L. coenopopulations

steps.description: Prepare the collected pollen samples for fertility analysis by staining and mounting on slides.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare pollen samples by staining and mounting

steps.description: Analyze the prepared slides under a microscope to assess pollen fertility.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze pollen fertility under a microscope

steps.description: Calculate the percentage of fertile pollen grains from the total observed.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate percentage of fertile pollen grains
